desktop.subtitle: A-AND-I AGENCY // DIGITAL ARCHITECTURE STUDIO
desktop.subheadline: We engineer scalable web platforms and autonomous AI infrastructure to eliminate operational drag and accelerate business growth.

projects.name: Truckers Budget
projects.desc: The all-in-one expense, income, and mileage tracker built for truck drivers. Track IRS standard per diem, settlements, loads, expenses, and IFTA recordkeeping. Includes an AI receipt scanner with automation, and online marketing with the creation of an AI influencer.

projects.name: Policarbonat-Center
projects.desc: High-performance B2B digital storefront built on Next.js. Features a smart calculation system and dynamic engineering calculator for precise material estimates.

projects.name: The Gun Store
projects.desc: Design reflects the cultural code of the legendary Las Vegas location. Features full Bizzley App CRM integration, custom payment system, and automated sales funnels.

columns.title: WEB PLATFORMS
columns.desc: High-performance websites and online platforms. We build corporate sites, B2B portals, and complex web apps with Next.js architecture and edge-ready deployment.

columns.title: APP DEV
columns.desc: Native and cross-platform mobile solutions. From UX/UI design to full deployment pipeline directly to the App Store and Google Play.

columns.title: AI AUTOMATION
columns.desc: Building custom AI automations and solutions for your business processes. We integrate autonomous agents, n8n workflows, and specialized LLMs.

appDevHover.title: APP DEV LIFECYCLE
steps: 1. Concept & Solution: Market analysis, prototyping, and architecture planning
2. MVP Development: Building core functionality for a rapid time-to-market
3. UI/UX Design: Intuitive interfaces tailored to your target audience
4. Frontend & Backend: Robust, scalable code and secure API development
5. Security Implementation: Data protection, encryption, and compliance
6. Payment Systems: Seamless integration with Stripe, Apple Pay, etc.
7. App Store Deployment: Full submission, review process, and launch

col1.title: 01 // WEB ENGINEERING
col1.content: Custom web applications, SaaS architectures, high-performance interfaces, and scalable frontend/backend systems.

col2.title: 02 // AUTONOMOUS SYSTEMS
col2.content: Context-aware LLM agents, cross-platform workflow orchestration via advanced API integrations, and automated generative media pipelines.

case1.title: ASSET_01 // LOGISTICS FINANCE ARCHITECTURE
case1.desc: Complex mobile/web application development, precise financial data control, and advanced UI/UX layout.

case2.title: ASSET_02 // B2B INTELLECTUAL COMMERCE PIPELINE
case2.desc: Deploying an asynchronous LLM sales agent integrated with inventory databases, processing real-time e-commerce operations.

initialize.title: INITIALIZE // REQUEST SYSTEM AUDIT
initialize.desc: Book a direct discovery call to analyze your operational bottlenecks and map out your digital infrastructure.
